title: agrostis stolonifera var. mutica
intro: Agrostis stolonifera var. mutica, also known as creeping bentgrass, is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. Traditionally, it has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which have been shown to aid in wound healing and reduce swelling. The health benefits of Agrostis stolonifera var. mutica include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and provide relief from respiratory problems. In herbal preparations, it can be made into a tea or infused in hot water to utilize its medicinal properties.
